data.title: Salesforce Supported Virtual Internship Program 2025- Philippines
data.description: Successfully completed the Salesforce Supported Virtual Internship Program, a comprehensive training program focused on developing skills in customer engagement, sales strategies, and digital marketing. This certification reflects my ability to leverage technology and innovative approaches to enhance customer experiences and drive business growth. It demonstrates my commitment to continuous learning and professional development in the dynamic field of digital marketing and customer relationship management.

data.title: Operating System Basics and Fundamentals
data.issuer: Bulacan State University | Cisco Networking Academy
data.description: Successfully achieved the student level credential for completing the 'Operating Systems Basics' course through the Cisco Networking Academy. This certification demonstrates my proficiency in Windows and Linux operating systems, including Windows administrative tools, Linux shell commands, system security implementation, and mobile operating system management. The course equipped me with practical skills in system resource configuration, monitoring, and management, essential for modern IT infrastructure administration.

data.title: Network Support and Security
data.issuer: Bulacan State University | Cisco Networking Academy
data.description: Successfully completed the 'Network Support and Security' course through the Cisco Networking Academy at Bulacan State University. This certification demonstrates my expertise in network infrastructure, cybersecurity principles, and system security best practices. It reflects my commitment to mastering critical skills in network administration and information security, essential for protecting modern IT systems.

data.title: AgentBlazer Champion Workshop Completion
data.description: Successfully completed the Agentblazer Champion Workshop, a comprehensive training program focused on developing skills in customer engagement, sales strategies, and digital marketing. This certification reflects my ability to leverage technology and innovative approaches to enhance customer experiences and drive business growth. It demonstrates my commitment to continuous learning and professional development in the dynamic field of digital marketing and customer relationship management.

data.title: Introduction to IoT and Digital Transformation
data.issuer: Bulacan State University (Main Campus) | Cisco Networking Academy
data.description: Recognized for completing the 'Introduction to IoT and Digital Transformation' course through the Cisco Networking Academy at Bulacan State University. This certification demonstrates my understanding of Internet of Things (IoT) concepts, digital transformation trends, and the integration of smart technologies in modern systems. It reflects my commitment to staying current with emerging technologies in the IT field.

data.title: BulSU 13th IT Congress – Hackathon Champion
data.description: Amid the electrifying atmosphere of the IT Congress Side Events, our team dove headfirst into the Hackathon, ready to tackle real-world challenges. Fueled by creativity, caffeine, and pure determination, we coded our way to victory! Our challenge? Develop an innovative eCommerce website from scratch within the given time limit. Competing before a prestigious panel of judges including Jean Eren Fajardo from SDPT Solutions—a renowned YouTube programming educator known for providing free programming tutorials and technical education in Tagalog to the Filipino developer community—we demonstrated seamless UI and UX logic with a user-friendly shopping experience. The judges were impressed with our innovative approach and technical execution, awarding us the championship title. This victory showcased our expertise in front-end development, problem-solving, and teamwork, proving that pressure is just fuel for innovation!

data.title: Best Capstone of the Year - SHS for Research and Innovation
data.issuer: Golden Minds Colleges Senior High School
data.description: Months of research, sleepless nights, and countless debugging sessions led to something truly remarkable! Our team developed a Web-Based Inventory Management System, designed to streamline stock tracking, optimize resource allocation, and eliminate inefficiencies for businesses. Our innovative approach and technical execution earned us the Best Thesis of the Year award at Golden Minds Colleges (GMC).

data.title: Consistent BSIT Dean's Lister S.Y 2024-2025, 2025-2026
data.description: As a dedicated student, I am proud to be recognized as a Dean's Lister in the BSIT program. This recognition is a testament to my academic excellence, academic integrity, and commitment to my studies. I am honored to have been selected for this prestigious award, and I am excited to continue my academic journey and make a positive impact in the field of Information Technology.
